summary.intent: Ship PR #13 for CHA-16 by running the /ship skill, which performs pre-landing checks, merges main into the feature branch, and pushes the final state.
summary.outcome: The ship pipeline completed successfully: all 498 tests passed, pre-landing review was clean, the CEO review plan doc was committed, and the branch was pushed to the open PR #13.

repo: The project uses git-cliff for CHANGELOG generation — no manual CHANGELOG entries needed.
Versioning uses date-based scheme with prepare-release.sh — no VERSION file to update.
The store layer (CrmStore) already had list_filtered, get_by_external, and get_with_channels fully implemented; the RPC layer was purely wiring with zero new persistence code.
moltis-web has a pre-existing unrelated CSS asset error that does not affect gateway or service-traits compilation.
CEO review artifacts are saved under plans/ with date-prefixed filenames (e.g., plans/2026-03-17-ceo-review-crm-contacts-rpc.md).

code.finding: CEO review plan doc was untracked and needed an explicit commit before push; it was not auto-staged by the ship pipeline.

workflow: The /ship skill runs a fixed pipeline: gstack preamble → detect base branch → pre-flight checks → merge main → review checklist → commit stragglers → push.
On rework runs, the skill checks for an existing branch and open PR rather than creating new ones.
Pre-landing review reads from ~/.claude/skills/review/checklist.md and uses ctx_batch_execute for parallel context reads.
Total test suite is 498 tests; scoped CRM tests (28) are run with cargo test -p moltis-gateway -- crm.

friction: No significant blockers; the only minor friction was the CEO review plan doc being untracked and requiring a separate commit step before push.
open_items: Decision 1 deferred: crm.contacts.list with no params returns ALL contacts (unbounded). Recommended fix-later to avoid a breaking change.

Decision 2 deferred: paginated results return a bare array with no total count or hasMore field. Recommended to coordinate a response envelope across all CRM endpoints rather than adding it to contacts only.
LIKE wildcard edge case in search filtering noted as a minor gap (1 of 12 mapped edge cases).
3 pre-existing architecture warnings in the gateway layer were noted but not addressed (out of scope for this PR).
